data.title: Tron Sees Significant Increase In Stablecoin Holdings
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Lookonchain reveals that over the past seven days, the Tron blockchain experienced an increase of $824.51 million in stablecoins, specifically USDT and USDC. In contrast, the Avalanche blockchain saw a decrease of $506 million in the same stablecoins. This shift highlights a notable movement of stablecoin assets between these two blockchain networks.

data.title: From the fall of “The DAO” to the restart of distributed capital: Synbo community fund pool exceeds 800 BNB
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, since the launch of Synbo, a venture capital fund based on the liquidity protocol on February 14, the community fund pool has attracted 800+ BNB (about 500,000 US dollars) of capital injection, and the market price of its mining coin ASM has reached 0.2 US dollars.

data.title: Pump.fun AMM Development Shakes Raydium as RAY Token Plummet
data.description:
Pump.fun AMM Development challenges Raydium’s dominance on Solana while tightening security against Bybit hackers’ illicit activities.
source: https://coincu.com/323993-pump-fun-amm-development-shakes-ray-token

data.title: Suspicious Transfers Happening on Ethereum
data.description:
CertiK Alert has logged some suspicious Ethereum transfers
source: https://u.today/suspicious-transfers-happening-on-ethereum

data.title: NEXUS: The developer network system is now online, and users can start Devnet mining
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the NEXUS developer network operating system has been launched, and users can start Devnet mining activities. Including: Devnet OS, Devnet chain and Devnet explorer.
Previously, NEXUS Testnet II was shut down at 4:00 am on February 23.

data.title: Bybit: ETH reserves are close to 100%, deposits and withdrawals have returned to normal
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bybit officially stated: "Our ETH reserves are close to 100%, and deposits and withdrawals have returned to normal. We know where the funds are going and are committed to turning this experience into an opportunity to strengthen the ecosystem."

data.title: Five addresses belonging to the same entity deposited $10.21 million of BAN to Gate in the past hour, and the estimated loss from selling is $3.15 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to monitoring by on-chain analyst Ai Yi, five addresses belonging to the same entity (it is not ruled out that they are Gate hot wallets) recharged BAN worth US$10.21 million to Gate in the past hour, with a recharge price of US$0.1016. The BAN of these five addresses were all withdrawn from Gate two days ago at a price of US$0.133. If sold, the estimated loss is US$3.15 million.

data.title: Whale Reduces RAY Holdings Amid Significant Losses
data.description: According to BlockBeats, a whale has reduced its holdings of 867,000 RAY tokens, valued at $2.83 million, accumulated over nearly four months. If sold, this would result in a loss of $1.27 million. Over the past three days, the whale has deposited $6.45 million worth of RAY into centralized exchanges at an average cost of $4.73 per token, incurring a total loss of $1.517 million.

data.title: Infini founder: All withdrawals have been responded to, and product consumption and withdrawals are currently normal
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Infini founder Christian posted on X platform that since the theft, Infini withdrawal applications have accumulated to 500,000 US dollars, all of which have been responded to, and even many users continue to deposit money. At present, all consumption and withdrawals of the product are normal. The only thing affected is the financial management part (because the contract has been suspended and funds have not been transferred to prevent secondary risks). It will take some time to propose and implement a more appropriate plan.

data.title: Infini Founder Ensures Smooth Withdrawals With Personal Funds
data.description: According to PANews, Infini founder Christian announced in a community message that withdrawals are currently proceeding smoothly. He stated that he is using personal funds to facilitate these transactions.
